videos.headline: Dylan Raiola finds Isaiah Neyor for Nebraska TD
videos.description: Dylan Raiola makes a nice pass to Isaiah Neyor to extend Nebraska's lead vs. Northern Iowa.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dylan Raiola finds Isaiah Neyor for Nebraska TD) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dylan Raiola finds Carter Nelson for Nebraska TD
videos.description: Dylan Raiola makes a nice pass to Carter Nelson who runs it in to open the scoring for Nebraska vs. Northern Iowa.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dylan Raiola finds Carter Nelson for Nebraska TD) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jacory Barney Jr. runs in for Nebraska TD
videos.description: Jacory Barney Jr. would not be denied as he punches in a touchdown to pad Nebraska's lead vs. Northern Iowa.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jacory Barney Jr. runs in for Nebraska TD) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dwight Bootle II makes big interception for Nebraska
videos.description: Nebraska's Dwight Bootle II picks off an overthrown pass from Aidan Dunne vs. Northern Iowa.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dwight Bootle II makes big interception for Nebraska) 2024/09/14 ESHEET
